tasks.title: Create theme definitions CSS
tasks.description: Create src/styles/themes.css with all 5 Ghostty-sourced theme definitions. Each theme block includes: raw palette (--palette-0 through --palette-15), theme-specific vars (--theme-bg, --theme-fg, --theme-cursor, --theme-cursor-text, --theme-selection-bg, --theme-selection-fg), semantic aliases (--bg-base, --bg-elevated, --bg-card, --bg-hover, --fg-primary, --fg-secondary, --fg-muted, --accent, --accent-dim, --accent-glow, --border, --border-focus, --selection-bg, --selection-fg), and grain vars (--grain-opacity, --grain-invert). The :root block uses Duotone Dark as default. Each [data-theme] block overrides all variables.
tasks.context:
## Spec Context
Create themes.css with 5 themes sourced from Ghostty terminal theme files.

### Color Data (from requirements.md Section 4)

Duotone Dark (default):
  palette 0-15: #1f1d27, #d9393e, #2dcd73, #d9b76e, #ffc284, #de8d40, #2488ff, #b7a1ff, #4e4a60, #d9393e, #2dcd73, #d9b76e, #ffc284, #de8d40, #2488ff, #eae5ff
  bg: #1f1d27, fg: #b7a1ff, cursor: #ff9839, cursor-text: #1f1d27
  selection-bg: #353147, selection-fg: #b7a2ff

Flexoki Light:
  palette 0-15: #100f0f, #af3029, #66800b, #ad8301, #205ea6, #a02f6f, #24837b, #6f6e69, #b7b5ac, #d14d41, #879a39, #d0a215, #4385be, #ce5d97, #3aa99f, #cecdc3
  bg: #fffcf0, fg: #100f0f, cursor: #100f0f, cursor-text: #fffcf0
  selection-bg: #cecdc3, selection-fg: #100f0f

Homebrew:
  palette 0-15: #000000, #990000, #00a600, #999900, #0d0dbf, #b200b2, #00a6b2, #bfbfbf, #666666, #e50000, #00d900, #e5e500, #0000ff, #e500e5, #00e5e5, #e5e5e5
  bg: #000000, fg: #00ff00, cursor: #23ff18, cursor-text: #ff0018
  selection-bg: #083905, selection-fg: #ffffff

Dracula:
  palette 0-15: #21222c, #ff5555, #50fa7b, #f1fa8c, #bd93f9, #ff79c6, #8be9fd, #f8f8f2, #6272a4, #ff6e6e, #69ff94, #ffffa5, #d6acff, #ff92df, #a4ffff, #ffffff
  bg: #282a36, fg: #f8f8f2, cursor: #f8f8f2, cursor-text: #282a36
  selection-bg: #44475a, selection-fg: #ffffff

Nord:
  palette 0-15: #3b4252, #bf616a, #a3be8c, #ebcb8b, #81a1c1, #b48ead, #88c0d0, #e5e9f0, #596377, #bf616a, #a3be8c, #ebcb8b, #81a1c1, #b48ead, #8fbcbb, #eceff4
  bg: #2e3440, fg: #d8dee9, cursor: #eceff4, cursor-text: #282828
  selection-bg: #eceff4, selection-fg: #4c566a

### CSS Variable Schema (from requirements.md Section 2.2)
Raw palette: --palette-0 through --palette-15
Theme vars: --theme-bg, --theme-fg, --theme-cursor, --theme-cursor-text, --theme-selection-bg, --theme-selection-fg
Semantic aliases: --bg-base (→ --theme-bg), --bg-elevated (derived), --bg-card (derived), --bg-hover (derived), --fg-primary (→ --theme-fg), --fg-secondary (→ --palette-7), --fg-muted (→ --palette-8), --accent (→ --palette-2 or theme-specific), --accent-dim (derived), --accent-glow (accent @ 15% alpha), --border (derived from bg), --border-focus (→ accent), --selection-bg (→ --theme-selection-bg), --selection-fg (→ --theme-selection-fg)
Grain vars: --grain-opacity (dark ~0.04, light ~0.03), --grain-invert (0 for dark, 1 for light)

### Structure
:root block = Duotone Dark defaults
[data-theme="duotone-dark"] = same as :root (explicit)
[data-theme="flexoki-light"] = light theme
[data-theme="homebrew"] = green-on-black
[data-theme="dracula"] = Dracula colors
[data-theme="nord"] = Nord colors

Derived colors strategy: hardcode per theme (no runtime color math). Dark themes: lighten bg. Light themes: darken bg.

tasks.title: Add theme init script to Layout.astro
tasks.description: Modify src/layouts/Layout.astro to add an inline <script> in <head> that: (1) reads localStorage('skitz0-theme'), (2) falls back to prefers-color-scheme (light → flexoki-light, dark → duotone-dark), (3) sets document.documentElement.dataset.theme before body renders, (4) exposes window.__theme = { set(name), get(), list() }. The set() function must also add/remove '.theme-transitioning' class with a 100ms timeout. Use is:inline on the script tag for Astro. Use try/catch around localStorage for privacy mode. Valid theme names: duotone-dark, flexoki-light, homebrew, dracula, nord.
tasks.context:
## Spec Context
FR-11: Persist theme in localStorage under 'skitz0-theme'
FR-12: On load, check localStorage first; if empty, prefers-color-scheme: light → Flexoki Light, dark/no pref → Duotone Dark
FR-13: Apply before first paint via inline <script> in <head>
FR-14/15: Transition via .theme-transitioning class, < 100ms
NFR-2: No FOUC

## Public API (Section 9 of requirements)
window.__theme = {
  set(name: string): boolean  // Apply theme, persist, return success
  get(): string               // Return current theme name
  list(): string[]             // Return available theme names
}

## Current Layout.astro Structure
Imports global.css in frontmatter. Has <html lang="en"><head>...</head><body> with skip-link, grain div, and <slot/>.

Key implementation notes:
- Use is:inline on <script> tag so Astro doesn't bundle it (must run synchronously in head)
- Script must be BEFORE the CSS link tags to execute before paint
- Use var (not const/let) for IE-safe syntax (though not required, keeps it minimal)
- try/catch localStorage for incognito/privacy browsers
- set() should: validate name against THEMES array, update dataset.theme, save to localStorage, add .theme-transitioning class, setTimeout 100ms to remove it, return true/false

tasks.title: Refactor global.css for theme support
tasks.description: Modify src/styles/global.css to: (1) Add @import './themes.css' after the font import, (2) Remove all color variable declarations from :root (they now live in themes.css), (3) Keep non-color tokens in :root (typography, spacing, layout, motion, radius), (4) Update ::selection to use var(--selection-bg) and var(--selection-fg), (5) Update .grain to use opacity: var(--grain-opacity, 0.04) and add filter: invert(var(--grain-invert, 0)), (6) Add .theme-transitioning rules for smooth color transitions with !important, (7) Add prefers-reduced-motion rule to disable theme transitions.
tasks.context:
## Spec Context
FR-7: All existing components must use only semantic CSS variables (no hardcoded colors)
FR-14: Theme switch transition < 100ms
FR-15: .theme-transitioning class enables transitions only during switch
FR-16/17: Grain overlay theme-aware via --grain-opacity and --grain-invert
NFR-5: prefers-reduced-motion disables theme transitions

## Current global.css Color Vars to REMOVE from :root
--bg-base: #0c0e0f
--bg-elevated: #131618
--bg-card: #181b1e
--bg-hover: #1e2226
--fg-primary: #e6e9ec
--fg-secondary: #9ca3af
--fg-muted: #6b7280
--accent: #84cc16
--accent-dim: #65a30d
--accent-glow: rgba(132, 204, 22, 0.15)
--border: #272b30
--border-focus: var(--accent)

These all move to themes.css. Keep all non-color vars in :root.

## Changes to existing rules
::selection → use var(--selection-bg) and var(--selection-fg) instead of --accent-glow and --accent
.grain → add opacity: var(--grain-opacity, 0.04) and filter: invert(var(--grain-invert, 0))

## New rules to add
.theme-transitioning * { transition: color 80ms ease, background-color 80ms ease, border-color 80ms ease, box-shadow 80ms ease !important; }
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .theme-transitioning * { transition: none !important; } }

## Dependencies
TASK-001 creates themes.css which this file imports.

tasks.title: Build verification and component audit
tasks.description: Verify the complete theme engine works: (1) Run 'npx astro build' and confirm success, (2) Run 'npx astro check' if available, (3) Grep all component files for hardcoded hex colors (grep -rn '#[0-9a-fA-F]' src/components/) — there should be none, (4) Verify themes.css contains all 5 theme blocks, (5) Verify Layout.astro has the inline script with window.__theme, (6) Verify global.css imports themes.css and has no hardcoded color values in :root.
tasks.context:
## Verification Checklist
1. npx astro build succeeds
2. No hardcoded hex colors in src/components/ files
3. themes.css has 5 [data-theme] blocks
4. Layout.astro has inline script with window.__theme
5. global.css imports themes.css, no color vars in :root
6. ::selection uses --selection-bg/--selection-fg
7. .grain uses --grain-opacity and --grain-invert
8. .theme-transitioning class exists
9. prefers-reduced-motion rule covers theme transitions

tasks.title: Create CHANGELOG.md
tasks.description: Create CHANGELOG.md with an [Unreleased] section documenting all changes from the terminal theme engine feature. Categories: Added (theme engine, 5 themes, window.__theme API, theme-aware grain, FOUC prevention, theme transitions).
tasks.context:
## CHANGELOG Format
Use Keep a Changelog format. Add entries under [Unreleased] for:
### Added
- Terminal theme engine with 5 Ghostty-sourced themes (Duotone Dark, Flexoki Light, Homebrew, Dracula, Nord)
- CSS custom property schema with raw palette (--palette-0 through --palette-15) and semantic aliases
- Theme persistence via localStorage with prefers-color-scheme fallback
- FOUC prevention via inline head script
- window.__theme API (set, get, list) for command bar integration
- Theme-aware grain overlay (adjusts opacity/inversion for light vs dark)
- Smooth theme transitions (80ms) with prefers-reduced-motion support

### Changed
- Migrated all component colors from hardcoded values to semantic CSS variables
- Selection styles now use theme-specific selection colors
